title: Ex-Tesla engineer’s startup taps Pronto to help automate a copper mine
summary: Pronto's autonomous haulage trucks are set to begin operations at Mariana Minerals's Utah copper mine in the company's first major deployment since its acquisition by Travis Kalanick's Atoms Inc. This deal marks a significant milestone for autonomous mining technology.
content: Pronto's autonomous haulage trucks are about to start operating at Mariana Minerals's Utah copper mine -- the first such deal since Pronto got acquired by Travis Kalanick's Atoms Inc.

zh.title: 特斯拉前工程师创业公司利用Pronto帮助自动化铜矿
zh.summary: Pronto的自动运输卡车将在Mariana Minerals位于犹他州的铜矿开始运营，这是该公司被Travis Kalanick的Atoms Inc收购后的首次重大部署。这笔交易标志着自动采矿技术的重要里程碑。

title: I tested three Windows laptops in the MacBook Neo’s price range — there’s no contest
summary: The MacBook Neo at $599 significantly outperforms Windows laptops in the same price range with superior build quality, performance, and design. The comparison underscores why Windows manufacturers must improve their offerings to compete in the affordable laptop segment.
content:
The Neo king of affordable laptops. | Photo: Antonio G. Di Benedetto / The Verge	

When the MacBook Neo arrived last month, I knew Windows laptop makers were in trouble. For $599, the Neo offers fantastic build quality and solid performance in a sleek and ultra-portable package. Windows laptops in this price range tend to be ugly, cheap-feeling, and a little slow.
Despite years of rumors, the MacBook Neo still seemed to take the Windows world by surprise. I expect proper competitors to pop up just as soon as the companies can manage, but I wanted to see what the competition in the PC space is like now. 
So I asked a bunch of laptop manufacturers to send me their best answers to the MacBook Neo.
The MacBook Neo is a 13-i …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我测试了三台价格与MacBook Neo相近的Windows笔记本电脑——毫无竞争力
zh.summary: 价格为599美元的MacBook Neo在同价位Windows笔记本电脑中表现明显优越，拥有更好的构建质量、性能和设计。这次对比强调了Windows制造商为何必须改进产品以在经济型笔记本市场中竞争。

title: Google makes it easy to deepfake yourself
summary: YouTube Shorts is launching AI-powered avatars that allow creators to digitally clone themselves for videos, framed as a safer approach to generative AI content. The rollout reflects YouTube's tension between embracing new generative features and combating AI-generated spam and impersonation abuse.
content:
YouTube Shorts is rolling out a new AI-powered feature giving creators an easy way to realistically clone themselves on camera. The launch, hinted at earlier this year, reflects the platform's fraught relationship with AI-generated content, adding more generative features while struggling to contain AI slop, deepfake scams, and impersonations. 
YouTube says the new tool will let users create a digital version of themselves, called an avatar, that can be inserted into existing Shorts videos or used to generate entirely new ones. The company said avatars will "look and sound like you," framing them as a safer and more secure way to use AI to  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌让你轻松深度伪造自己
zh.summary: YouTube Shorts正在推出AI驱动的虚拟形象，允许创作者为视频数字克隆自己，作为一种更安全的生成式AI内容方法。这次推出反映了YouTube在拥抱新生成式功能与打击AI生成垃圾邮件和冒充滥用之间的矛盾。

title: Spotify now lets you turn off all its videos
summary: Spotify is rolling out new toggles that let users completely disable video content across the app for both music and podcasts. The feature works across all platforms and devices, with family plan managers able to restrict video access for all members.
content:
The new controls apply to both individual and family accounts. | Image: Spotify	

Spotify is adding new toggles to stop any and all video from playing inside the app, for both music and podcasts. The controls are rolling out worldwide, work across all platforms and devices, and can be used by managers of Family Plans to limit video content for every member on the subscription.
The new controls haven't arrived on my UK account or devices yet, but will appear under the "Content and display" settings on a phone, or the "Display" section on desktop. The existing toggle to disable Canvas clips - the short, looping, autoplay videos that Spotify added to the app in 2019 - is joined by a new toggle that disables access to music  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Spotify 现在允许用户完全关闭所有视频
zh.summary: Spotify 推出新的开关，让用户可以在应用中完全禁用音乐和播客的视频内容。该功能在所有平台和设备上都可用，家庭计划管理员可以限制所有成员的视频访问权限。

title: Amflow’s latest e-bikes with Avinox motors raise the bar again
summary: Amflow's new electric mountain bikes powered by Avinox motors deliver up to 150Nm of climbing assist while maintaining competitive weight, breaking traditional power-versus-weight tradeoffs in e-bikes. Over 60 manufacturers have adopted Avinox drives, signaling industry-wide shifts in motor technology.
content:
150Nm of raw climbing assist. | Image: Amflow	

Amflow, the e-bike brand spun out of DJI, is back with two impressive electric mountain bike ranges built around its incredibly dense Avinox motors. The e-MTBs aim to break the traditional tradeoff between power, range, and weight.
Even better, if Amflow's bikes don't appeal to you then over 60 other e-bike makers have adopted Avinox drive systems, including Canyon, Mondraker, and Pivot. That should give you ample choice and puts competitors like Bosch firmly on notice.
The flagship Amflow PX (weighing around 20kg / 44lbs) and the Amflow PR (weighing around 22kg / 49lbs) are powered by Avinox's new M2S and M2 drive systems, delivering up t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Amflow 搭载 Avinox 电机的最新电动自行车再次刷新标杆
zh.summary: Amflow 的新型电动山地车采用 Avinox 电机驱动，提供高达 150Nm 的爬坡辅助，同时保持具竞争力的重量，打破了电动自行车传统的功率-重量权衡。60 多个制造商已采用 Avinox 驱动，预示着电机技术的行业范围转变。

title: The Moon is already on Google Maps—did Artemis II really tell us anything new?
summary: Google Maps already features the Moon, raising questions about whether NASA's Artemis II mission provided substantive scientific value beyond public engagement and media relations.
content: "I think the biggest value here is the PR. I mean, it's getting the public excited."

zh.title: 月球已经在谷歌地图上了——阿尔忒弥斯二号任务真的告诉了我们什么新东西吗？
zh.summary: 谷歌地图已经包含了月球，引发了关于美国宇航局阿尔忒弥斯二号任务是否除了公众参与和媒体关系外还提供了实质性科学价值的疑问。

title: Gemini gets notebooks to help you organize projects
summary: Google's Gemini is introducing a "notebooks" feature that lets users organize files, conversations, and custom instructions about specific topics as a personal knowledge base, mirroring ChatGPT's 2024 Projects feature.
content:
Google's Gemini is getting a feature called "notebooks" to help you organize things about certain topics in a single place while using the AI chatbot, the company announced on Wednesday. You can pull in things like files, past conversations, and custom instructions into notebooks that Gemini can then use as context while you're talking with it. 
Notebooks sound a lot like ChatGPT's Projects feature, which launched in 2024 and similarly lets users store things about a certain topic in one spot. Google says to "think of notebooks as personal knowledge bases shared across Google products, starting in Gemini." Gemini's Notebooks also sync with  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Gemini 推出笔记本功能帮助您组织项目
zh.summary: Google的Gemini推出了"笔记本"功能，让用户可以组织文件、对话和关于特定主题的自定义说明作为个人知识库，与ChatGPT的2024年Projects功能相似。

title: Dyson made a handheld version of its iconic fans
summary: Dyson has released the HushJet Mini Cool, a handheld personal cooler that miniaturizes its iconic bladeless Air Multiplier fan design with a 65,000rpm DC motor for portable cooling.
content:
Nearly 17 years after Dyson first announced its Air Multiplier fans - one of its first big consumer products after vacuums - the company has miniaturized their design to create a handheld personal cooler called the HushJet Mini Cool. Like Dyson's larger Air Multipliers, humidifiers, air purifiers, and heaters, the HushJet Mini Cool doesn't have any visible spinning blades to nick fingers or get tangled up in clothing or jewelry. All of its moving parts are safely hidden away, which is important because, like Dyson's hair dryers, the HushJet Mini Cool is made to be held.
A brushless 65,000rpm DC motor produces a blast of air at speeds of up  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Dyson推出了其标志性风扇的手持版本
zh.summary: Dyson推出了HushJet Mini Cool手持式个人冷却器，采用65,000转/分钟的直流电动机，将其标志性无叶空气倍增器风扇设计小型化，实现便携式制冷。
